setupGuide.notes: AMS2's Kyalami 2019 is the modern layout of the same venue as the 'new' Kyalami that hosted the 1992 race; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.

Placeholder for Autódromo Hermanos Rodríguez — 69 laps / 305 km reproduced as 61 laps of Jacarepagua Historic. Jacarepaguá keeps the era's flat, long-straight Latin American GP character (Brazilian GP host 1981-1989); the base-era Interlagos suggestion doubles as this season's Brazilian GP venue.

track.realVenue: Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari

setupGuide.notes: Placeholder for Circuit de Nevers Magny-Cours — 69 laps / 293.3 km reproduced as 70 laps of Le Mans Circuit Bugatti. Keeps the French GP at a French Grand Prix venue (the f1-1988 pack's Paul Ricard convention); the 90s-Barcelona suggestion doubles as this season's Spanish GP venue.
AMS2 ships the 2025 Hungaroring; the venue is real and largely unchanged in character since 1986, so the historical lap count is kept.
No 1992 Spa layout in AMS2; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the era-matching 1993 layout.
Suzuka appears in AMS2 as Kansai; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the classic (pre-2003) layout.
